mapper.sql: select r.resource_id, r.resource_name, r.resource_type_id, r.file_url, r.file_size, r.course_id, r.teacher_id, r.description, r.is_public, r.download_count, r.status, r.del_flag, r.create_time, r.update_time, t.type_name, c.course_name, CONCAT(et.title, ' ', u.nickname) as upload_by_name from edu_teaching_resource r left join edu_resource_type t on r.resource_type_id = t.type_id left join edu_course c on r.course_id = c.course_id left join edu_teacher et on r.teacher_id = et.teacher_id left join sys_user u on et.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: where r.course_id = #{courseId} and r.del_flag = 0 order by r.create_time desc
mapper.update: update edu_teaching_resource set del_flag = 1, update_time = now() where resource_id = #{resourceId}
